channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: FLOKI’s chart hates momentum: RSI 56.9, MACD flat, 15% risk to key supports. Sideways drift ahead as volume stays thin. 🔒💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260430-price-prediction-floki-consolidation-phase-signals-15-downside-risk #crypto #floki #trading
